         .-%#%*%%#****%%#=:.       ..     .. .*.      .

       .  -%%%**********+--.   .  ..:*%=-. .:+:  .. . .

 ..  .    :+##********##===*-....  ...:++===*=.      .   
    .     .-#%#%*****##@=-*= ....:=#%+.                  
        .     :%%%%#%*%%#*..      .:+.                .  
        . .   -@%#%#******+..   .  .-+.

            :%*%********+...  .    . .%.            .  . 
       .   .*##%*********....        .:+.  .   .

repeat wait() until game:IsLoaded()
print("Game Loaded")

repeat task.wait() until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character or game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
print("Character loaded")

local LibraryURL = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Yv50/Ui-lib/main/"
local Library = (loadstring(game:HttpGet(LibraryURL .. "Library.lua")))()
local ThemeManager = (loadstring(game:HttpGet(LibraryURL .. "addons/ThemeManager.lua")))()
local SaveManager = (loadstring(game:HttpGet(LibraryURL .. "addons/SaveManager.lua")))()
local PlayerESPModule = (loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Yv50/testing-stuff/refs/heads/main/pre")))()

local Window = Library:CreateWindow({
    Title = "Sex Ghoul://RE | discord.gg/cielbasement | This is FREE",
    Center = true,
    AutoShow = true,
    TabPadding = 8
})

    PlayerTab = Window:AddTab("Players"),
    WorldTab = Window:AddTab("World"),
    VisualTab = Window:AddTab("Visual"),
    MiscTab = Window:AddTab("Miscs"),

}

    ["rbxassetid://112467136433884"] = {Delay = 150, Parryable = true, MultiHit = false, Range = 30, RepeatCount = 0, RepeatDelay = 0},

    ["rbxassetid://101138797487568"] = {Delay = 650, Parryable = true, MultiHit = false, Range = 100, RepeatCount = 0, RepeatDelay = 0},
    ["rbxassetid://108769432958516"] = {Delay = 550, Parryable = true, MultiHit = false, Range = 100, RepeatCount = 0, RepeatDelay = 0},
    ["rbxassetid://85467164225058"] = {Delay = 700, Parryable = true, MultiHit = false, Range = 100, RepeatCount = 0, RepeatDelay = 0},
    ["rbxassetid://121339998382547"] = {Delay = 730, Parryable = true, MultiHit = false, Range = 100, RepeatCount = 0, RepeatDelay = 0}
}

local function GetDistance(position1, position2)
    return (position1 - position2).Magnitude
end

local function TeleportTo(x, y, z)
    local remoteData = {}
    local packetData = {{Module = "Dash"}, "\005"}
    remoteData[1] = packetData
    game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main"):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent"):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.PrimaryPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(x, y, z)
end

local function ServerHop()
    local serverListURL = "https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/" .. game.PlaceId .. "/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100"
    
    local function FetchServers(cursor)
        return HttpService:JSONDecode(game:HttpGet(serverListURL .. (cursor and "&cursor=" .. cursor or "")))
    end
    
    local nextCursor = nil
    while true do
        local serverData = FetchServers(nextCursor)
        local selectedServer = serverData.data[math.random(1, #serverData.data / 3)]
        nextCursor = serverData.nextPageCursor
        
        if selectedServer and (selectedServer.playing < selectedServer.maxPlayers and selectedServer.id ~= game.JobId) then
            break
        end
        
        if not nextCursor then
            warn("No suitable server found, retrying...")
            ServerHop()
            return
        end
    end
    
    TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game.PlaceId, v42.id, game.Players.LocalPlayer)
end

local function SmoothTeleport(targetCFrame, speed)
    local playerCharacter = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if playerCharacter and playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        local rootPart = playerCharacter.HumanoidRootPart
        local startCFrame = rootPart.CFrame
        local startTime = tick()
        local duration = (startCFrame.Position - targetCFrame.Position).Magnitude / speed
        
        rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new()
        rootPart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.new()
        
        local connection = nil
        connection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
            local elapsed = tick() - startTime
            if duration > elapsed then
                local alpha = elapsed / duration
                rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new()
                rootPart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.new()
                rootPart.CFrame = startCFrame:Lerp(targetCFrame, alpha)
            else
                rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new()
                rootPart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.new()
                rootPart.CFrame = targetCFrame
                connection:Disconnect()
            end
        end)
    end
end

local BodyVelocity = nil
local FlyRootPart = nil
local FlyCFrame = nil
local FlyHumanoid = nil
local CharacterAddedConnection = nil

local function CreateBodyVelocity()
    local playerCharacter = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if not (BodyVelocity and BodyVelocity.Parent) then
        BodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
        BodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        BodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, 0, math.huge)
        BodyVelocity.Parent = playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("Torso")
    end
end

local function GetMoveDirection()
    local direction = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
    local cameraCFrame = workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame
    local forwardVector = Vector3.new(cameraCFrame.LookVector.X, 0, cameraCFrame.LookVector.Z).Unit
    local rightVector = Vector3.new(cameraCFrame.RightVector.X, 0, cameraCFrame.RightVector.Z).Unit
    
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.W) then
        direction = direction + forwardVector
    end
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) then
        direction = direction - forwardVector
    end
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) then
        direction = direction - rightVector
    end
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) then
        direction = direction + rightVector
    end
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then
        direction = direction + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
    end
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then
        direction = direction - Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
    end
    
    return direction.Magnitude > 0 and direction.Unit or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
end

local function UpdateFly(deltaTime)
    if Settings.flying and (LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
        FlyRootPart = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        FlyHumanoid = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
        
        if FlyHumanoid then
            FlyHumanoid.PlatformStand = true
        end
        
        if not FlyCFrame then
            FlyCFrame = FlyRootPart.CFrame
        end
        
        local moveDirection = GetMoveDirection()
        if moveDirection.Magnitude > 0 then
            FlyCFrame = FlyCFrame + (moveDirection * Settings.flyingSpeed) * deltaTime
        end
        
        local lookVector = workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector
        local flatLookVector = Vector3.new(lookVector.X, 0, lookVector.Z).Unit
        
        if flatLookVector.Magnitude > 0 then
            FlyCFrame = CFrame.new(FlyCFrame.Position, FlyCFrame.Position + flatLookVector)
        end
        
        FlyRootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new()
        FlyRootPart.CFrame = FlyCFrame
    elseif FlyRootPart and FlyHumanoid then
        FlyHumanoid.PlatformStand = false
    end
end

local function ToggleFly(enabled)
    Settings.flying = enabled
    if Settings.flying then
        RunService:BindToRenderStep("Fly", Enum.RenderPriority.Input.Value, UpdateFly)
    else
        RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep("Fly")
        FlyCFrame = nil
    end
end

local function UpdateSpeedhack(deltaTime)
    if not Settings.flying then
        local playerCharacter = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if Settings.speedhack and (playerCharacter and playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
            CreateBodyVelocity()
            local humanoid = playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
            if humanoid then
                local moveDirection = humanoid.MoveDirection
                if moveDirection and moveDirection.Magnitude > 0 then
                    BodyVelocity.Velocity = moveDirection * ((Settings.speedhackWalkSpeed + humanoid.WalkSpeed) / 2)
                else
                    BodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                end
            end
        elseif BodyVelocity then
            BodyVelocity:Destroy()
            BodyVelocity = nil
        end
    end
end

local function InfiniteJumpLoop(enabled)
    if not enabled then
        return
    end
    
    while true do
        local rootPart = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if rootPart and UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then
            rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(rootPart.Velocity.X, Settings.infjumpheight, rootPart.Velocity.Z)
        end
        task.wait(0.1)
        if not (Settings.infJump and enabled) then
            return
        end
    end
end

local function ToggleSpeedhack(enabled)
    Settings.speedhack = enabled
    if Settings.speedhack then
        RunService:BindToRenderStep("Speedhack", Enum.RenderPriority.Input.Value + (Settings.flying and 1 or 0), UpdateSpeedhack)
    else
        RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep("Speedhack")
        if BodyVelocity then
            BodyVelocity:Destroy()
            BodyVelocity = nil
        end
    end
end

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Fly", {
    Text = "Fly",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Fly",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ToggleFly(enabled)
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("FlyKeybind", {
    Default = "Y",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Fly Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddSlider("FlySpeed", {
    Text = "Fly Speed",
    Default = 100,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 1000,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.flyingSpeed = value
    end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Speedhack", {
    Text = "Speedhack",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Speedhack",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ToggleSpeedhack(enabled)
        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if enabled then
            if not CharacterAddedConnection then
                CharacterAddedConnection = player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
                    if BodyVelocity then
                        BodyVelocity:Destroy()
                        BodyVelocity = nil
                    end
                    if Settings.speedhack then
                        ToggleSpeedhack(false)
                        ToggleSpeedhack(true)
                    end
                end)
            end
        elseif CharacterAddedConnection then
            CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
            CharacterAddedConnection = nil
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("SpeedhackKeybind", {
    Default = "N",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Speedhack Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddSlider("Speedhack Speed", {
    Text = "Speedhack Speed",
    Default = 100,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 1000,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.speedhackWalkSpeed = value
    end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Infinite Jump", {
    Text = "Infinite Jump",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Infinite Jump",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.infJump = enabled
        if Settings.infJump then
            InfiniteJumpLoop(true)
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("InfiniteJumpKeybind", {
    Default = "H",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Infinite Jump Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddSlider("InfiniteJump Height", {
    Text = "InfiniteJump Height",
    Default = 50,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 1000,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.infjumpheight = value
    end
})

local NoclipConnection = nil

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Noclip", {
    Text = "Noclip",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "noclip",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.noclip = enabled
        if NoclipConnection then
            NoclipConnection:Disconnect()
            NoclipConnection = nil
        end
        
        if enabled then
            if LocalPlayer.Character then
                local head = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                local torso = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
                if head then
                    head.CanCollide = false
                end
                if torso then
                    torso.CanCollide = false
                end
            end
            
            NoclipConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                if Settings.noclip and LocalPlayer.Character then
                    local head = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                    local torso = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
                    if head then
                        head.CanCollide = false
                    end
                    if torso then
                        torso.CanCollide = false
                    end
                end
            end)
        elseif LocalPlayer.Character then
            local head = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
            local torso = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
            if head then
                head.CanCollide = true
            end
            if torso then
                torso.CanCollide = true
            end
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("NoclipKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Noclip Keybind",
    NoUI = false
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Bypass Anti-Speed", {
    Text = "Bypass Anti-Speed",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Bypass Anti-Speed",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.bypassSpeed = enabled
        if Settings.bypassSpeed then
            while Settings.bypassSpeed and task.wait() do
                local remoteData = {{{Module = "Dash"}, "\005"}}
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main"):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent"):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
            end
        end
    end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("AutoM1", {
    Text = "Auto M1",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto M1",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autoswing = enabled
        if Settings.autoswing then
            repeat
                local remoteData = {{{Module = "M1"}, "\005"}}
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main", 9000000000):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent", 9000000000):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
                task.wait(0.1)
            until not Settings.autoswing
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoM1Keybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto M1 Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("AutoCrit", {
    Text = "Auto Critical",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Critical",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autocrit = enabled
        if Settings.autocrit then
            repeat
                local remoteData = {{{Module = "M2"}, "\005"}}
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main", 9000000000):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent", 9000000000):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
                task.wait()
            until not Settings.autocrit
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("autocritKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto Crit Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("AutoUppercut", {
    Text = "Auto Uppercut",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Uppercut",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autouppercut = enabled
        if Settings.autouppercut then
            repeat
                local remoteData = {{{Module = "Uppercut"}, "\005"}}
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main", 9000000000):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent", 9000000000):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
                task.wait(0.1)
            until not Settings.autouppercut
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoUppercutKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto Uppercut Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

local PerfectRollConnection = nil

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("autoPerfectRoll", {
    Text = "Auto Perfect Roll",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Uppercut",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autoperfectroll = enabled
        if PerfectRollConnection then
            PerfectRollConnection:Disconnect()
            PerfectRollConnection = nil
        end
        
        if Settings.autoperfectroll then
            PerfectRollConnection = UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
                if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q then
                    task.wait(Options.AutoPerfectRollDelay.Value)
                    mouse2click()
                end
            end)
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoPerfectRollKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto Perfect Roll Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddSlider("AutoPerfectRollDelay", {
    Text = "Auto Perfect Roll Delay",
    Default = 0,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 1,
    Rounding = 1,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value) end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Auto Fragment", {
    Text = "Auto Fragment",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Fragment",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autofragment = enabled
        if Settings.autofragment then
            task.spawn(function()
                for _, item in ipairs(LocalPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
                    if string.find(item.Name, "Fragment") then
                        item.Parent = LocalPlayer.Character
                        VirtualInputManager:SendMouseButtonEvent(0, 0, 0, true, game, 0)
                        VirtualInputManager:SendMouseButtonEvent(0, 0, 0, false, game, 0)
                        task.wait()
                        item.Parent = LocalPlayer.Backpack
                    end
                end
                task.wait()
                if not Settings.autofragment then
                    return
                end
            end)
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoFragmentKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto Fragment Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.ChildAdded:Connect(function(gui)
    if gui.Name == "BagGui" and Settings.AutoLoot then
        local itemsFrame = gui.Frame.ItemsFrame
        for _, button in pairs(itemsFrame:GetChildren()) do
            if button:IsA("TextButton") then
                GuiService.SelectedObject = button
                task.wait(0.1)
                VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.Return, false, game)
                task.wait(0)
                VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.Return, false, game)
                button.Active = false
                button.AutoButtonColor = false
                button.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(128, 128, 128)
                GuiService.SelectedObject = nil
            end
        end
    end
end)

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("AutoLoot", {
    Text = "Auto Loot",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Loot items ",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.AutoLoot = enabled
        if enabled then
            for _, button in pairs(game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("BagGui").Frame.ItemsFrame:GetChildren()) do
                if button:IsA("TextButton") then
                    GuiService.SelectedObject = button
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.Return, false, game)
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.Return, false, game)
                    button.Active = false
                    button.AutoButtonColor = false
                    button.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(128, 128, 128)
                    GuiService.SelectedObject = nil
                end
            end
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoLootKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto Loot Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

local NoAnimsThread = nil
local NoAnimsCharacterConnection = nil
local StoredAnimTracks = {}
local OriginalAnimTracks = {}

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("No Anims", {
    Text = "No Anims",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Freezes character animations",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.noanims = enabled
        
        if NoAnimsThread then
            task.cancel(NoAnimsThread)
            NoAnimsThread = nil
        end
        
        if NoAnimsCharacterConnection then
            NoAnimsCharacterConnection:Disconnect()
            NoAnimsCharacterConnection = nil
        end
        
        if Settings.noanims then
            local function SetupNoAnims(character)
                local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") or character:WaitForChild("Humanoid", 2)
                if humanoid then
                    local animator = humanoid:FindFirstChildOfClass("Animator") or humanoid:WaitForChild("Animator", 2)
                    if animator then
                        local freezeAnimation = Instance.new("Animation")
                        freezeAnimation.AnimationId = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=109212722752"
                        
                        NoAnimsThread = task.spawn(function()
                            while Settings.noanims and (humanoid and humanoid.Parent) do
                                local currentTrack = nil
                                
                                for _, track in pairs(animator:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
                                    if track.Animation.AnimationId == freezeAnimation.AnimationId then
                                        currentTrack = track
                                    else
                                        if not table.find(OriginalAnimTracks, track) then
                                            table.insert(OriginalAnimTracks, track)
                                        end
                                        pcall(function()
                                            track:Stop()
                                            task.defer(track.Destroy, track)
                                        end)
                                    end
                                end
                                
                                if not currentTrack then
                                    local loadedTrack = animator:LoadAnimation(freezeAnimation)
                                    table.insert(StoredAnimTracks, loadedTrack)
                                    loadedTrack.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Core
                                    loadedTrack:AdjustSpeed(0)
                                    loadedTrack:Play()
                                end
                                
                                task.wait(0.1)
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if LocalPlayer.Character then
                SetupNoAnims(LocalPlayer.Character)
            end
            
            NoAnimsCharacterConnection = LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(SetupNoAnims)
        else
            for _, track in pairs(StoredAnimTracks) do
                pcall(function()
                    track:Stop()
                    track:Destroy()
                end)
            end
            StoredAnimTracks = {}
            
            for _, track in pairs(OriginalAnimTracks) do
                pcall(function()
                    track:Play()
                end)
            end
            OriginalAnimTracks = {}
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("NoAnimsKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "No Anims Keybind",
    NoUI = false
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Auto Grip", {
    Text = "Auto Grip",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Grip",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autogrip = enabled
        if Settings.autogrip then
            task.spawn(function()
                while Settings.autogrip and task.wait() do
                    local closestDistance = math.huge
                    local closestTarget = nil
                    
                    for _, entity in ipairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
                        if entity ~= Character and (entity:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and entity:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
                            local humanoid = entity.Humanoid
                            local distance = (entity.HumanoidRootPart.Position - Character.PrimaryPart.Position).Magnitude
                            
                            if distance <= 5 and humanoid.Health <= 2.5 then
                                if distance < closestDistance then
                                    closestTarget = entity
                                    closestDistance = distance
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    if closestTarget then
                        local remoteData = {{{Module = "Grip"}, "\005"}}
                        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main"):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent"):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
                        
                        repeat
                            task.wait(0)
                            local targetRoot = closestTarget:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        until not targetRoot or (targetRoot.Position - Character.PrimaryPart.Position).Magnitude > 6 or not closestTarget.Parent or closestTarget:FindFirstChild("Humanoid").Health <= 0
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddToggle("Auto Equip", {
    Text = "Auto Equip",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Equip",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autoequip = enabled
        if Settings.autoequip then
            while Settings.autoequip and task.wait(0.1) do
                if not Character:GetAttribute("CombatMode") then
                    local remoteData = {{{Module = "Toggle", IsHolding = true}, "\005"}}
                    game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("Bridgenet2Main", 9000000000):WaitForChild("dataRemoteEvent", 9000000000):FireServer(unpack(remoteData))
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

LocalPlayerGroupbox:AddButton({
    Text = "Kill Yourself",
    Func = function()
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid"):TakeDamage(math.huge)
    end,
    Tooltip = "Commit Suicide"
})

local ParryConnections = {}

local function GetPlayerPing()
    local success, ping = pcall(function()
        return math.floor(Players.LocalPlayer:GetNetworkPing() * 1000)
    end)
    return success and (ping and ping) or 0
end

local function GetFrameTime()
    local success, frameTime = pcall(function()
        return math.floor((1 / RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()) * 1000)
    end)
    return success and (frameTime and frameTime) or 0
end

local function AdjustDelayForPing(delay, adjustEnabled)
    if not adjustEnabled then
        return delay
    end
    local ping = GetPlayerPing()
    local frameTime = GetFrameTime()
    local adjustedDelay = delay - (ping / 2 + frameTime / 2)
    return math.max(50, adjustedDelay)
end

local function IsInRange(character1, character2, range)
    if range then
        local root1 = character1:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local root2 = character2:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if root1 and root2 then
            return (root1.Position - root2.Position).Magnitude <= range
        else
            return false
        end
    else
        return true
    end
end

local function ExecuteParry(animData)
    local function PerformParry()
        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.F, false, game)
        if animData.Hold then
            task.wait(0.1)
        end
        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.F, false, game)
    end
    
    if animData.RepeatCount and animData.RepeatCount > 0 then
        for i = 1, animData.RepeatCount do
            pcall(PerformParry)
            if i < animData.RepeatCount then
                if animData.RepeatDelay then
                    task.wait(animData.RepeatDelay / 1000)
                end
            end
        end
    else
        pcall(PerformParry)
    end
    
    if animData.RepeatParryAmount and animData.RepeatParryAmount > 0 then
        task.wait(animData.RepeatParryDelay / 1000)
        for i = 1, animData.RepeatParryAmount do
            pcall(PerformParry)
            if i < animData.RepeatParryAmount then
                task.wait(animData.RepeatDelay or 0.1)
            end
        end
    end
end

local function SetupAutoParryForEntity(entity)
    if Settings.Autoparry then
        if entity ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character then
            local humanoid = entity:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            if humanoid then
                local connection = humanoid.AnimationPlayed:Connect(function(animTrack)
                    if Settings.Autoparry then
                        local animation = animTrack.Animation
                        if animation then
                            local animData = AnimationDatabase[animation.AnimationId]
                            if animData then
                                local playerCharacter = Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                                if playerCharacter and not IsInRange(playerCharacter, entity, animData.Range) then
                                    return
                                else
                                    local adjustedDelay = AdjustDelayForPing(animData.Delay or 0, Settings.AutoParryAdjustToPing)
                                    if adjustedDelay > 0 then
                                        task.wait(adjustedDelay / 1000)
                                    end
                                    ExecuteParry(animData)
                                    
                                    if not animData.Parryable then
                                        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.Q, false, game)
                                        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.Q, false, game)
                                        if Settings.autorollcancel then
                                            task.wait(0.1)
                                            mouse2click()
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
                table.insert(ParryConnections, connection)
            end
        end
    end
end

local function InitializeAutoParry()
    for _, connection in ipairs(ParryConnections) do
        pcall(connection.Disconnect, connection)
    end
    ParryConnections = {}
    
    if Settings.Autoparry then
        local entitiesFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Entities")
        if entitiesFolder then
            for _, entity in pairs(entitiesFolder:GetChildren()) do
                task.spawn(SetupAutoParryForEntity, entity)
            end
            
            entitiesFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(entity)
                task.spawn(SetupAutoParryForEntity, entity)
            end)
        end
    end
end

AutoParryGroupbox:AddToggle("Auto Parry", {
    Text = "Auto Parry",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Automatically parry enemy attacks",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.Autoparry = enabled
        if Settings.Autoparry then
            InitializeAutoParry()
        else
            for _, connection in ipairs(ParryConnections) do
                pcall(function()
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end)
            end
            ParryConnections = {}
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoParryKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Auto Parry Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

AutoParryGroupbox:AddToggle("AdjustToPing", {
    Text = "Adjust to Ping",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Adjust parry timing based on your ping",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.AutoParryAdjustToPing = enabled
    end
})

AutoParryGroupbox:AddToggle("Auto Roll Cancel", {
    Text = "Auto Roll Cancel",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Roll Cancel",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.autorollcancel = enabled
    end
})

local function GetAimbotTargets()
    local targets = {}
    for _, entity in ipairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
        if entity ~= Character then
            local isPlayer = Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) ~= nil
            if Settings.aimbotPlayers and isPlayer or Settings.aimbotMobs and not isPlayer then
                table.insert(targets, entity)
            end
        end
    end
    return targets
end

local function IsTargetVisible(targetPart)
    local ray = Ray.new(Camera.CFrame.Position, (targetPart.Position - Camera.CFrame.Position).Unit * 1000)
    local hitPart = workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(ray, {Character, Camera})
    if hitPart then
        hitPart = hitPart:IsDescendantOf(targetPart.Parent)
    end
    return hitPart
end

local function GetClosestTarget()
    local closestDistance = math.huge
    local closestTarget = nil
    
    for _, entity in ipairs(GetAimbotTargets()) do
        local targetPart = entity:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or entity:FindFirstChild("Head")
        if targetPart then
            local screenPos = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(targetPart.Position)
            if math.deg(math.acos(Camera.CFrame.LookVector:Dot((targetPart.Position - Camera.CFrame.Position).Unit))) <= Settings.aimbotFOV / 2 and (not Settings.aimbotVisible or IsTargetVisible(targetPart)) then
                local mousePos = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
                local distance = (Vector2.new(mousePos.X, mousePos.Y) - Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y)).Magnitude
                if distance < closestDistance then
                    closestTarget = targetPart
                    closestDistance = distance
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return closestTarget
end

local AimbotConnection = nil

CameraGroupbox:AddToggle("Aimbot", {
    Text = "Aimbot",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Aimbot",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.aimbotEnabled = enabled
        if not Settings.aimbotEnabled then
            Settings.aimbotActive = false
        end
        
        if AimbotConnection then
            AimbotConnection:Disconnect()
            AimbotConnection = nil
        end
        
        if Settings.aimbotEnabled then
            AimbotConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                local target = Settings.aimbotActive and GetClosestTarget()
                if target then
                    local targetPosition = target.Position
                    if Settings.aimbotXOffset ~= 0 or Settings.aimbotYOffset ~= 0 then
                        local screenPos = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(targetPosition)
                        local offsetPos = Vector2.new(screenPos.X + Settings.aimbotXOffset, screenPos.Y + Settings.aimbotYOffset)
                        local ray = Camera:ViewportPointToRay(offsetPos.X, offsetPos.Y)
                        targetPosition = ray.Origin + ray.Direction * 100
                    end
                    Camera.CFrame = CFrame.new(Camera.CFrame.Position, targetPosition)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddLabel("Aimbot Keybind"):AddKeyPicker("AimbotKeybind", {
    Default = "MB2",
    SyncToggleState = false,
    Mode = "Hold",
    Text = "Aimbot Keybind",
    NoUI = true,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.aimbotActive = enabled
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddToggle("Aimbot Players", {
    Text = "Target Players",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Target other players",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.aimbotPlayers = enabled
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddToggle("Aimbot Mobs", {
    Text = "Target Mobs",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Target Mobs",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.aimbotMobs = enabled
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddToggle("Visible Only", {
    Text = "Visible Only",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Only target visible enemies",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.aimbotVisible = enabled
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddSlider("Aimbot X Offset", {
    Text = "Aimbot X Offset",
    Default = 0,
    Min = -300,
    Max = 300,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.aimbotXOffset = value
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddSlider("Aimbot Y Offset", {
    Text = "Aimbot Y Offset",
    Default = 0,
    Min = -300,
    Max = 300,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.aimbotYOffset = value
    end
})

local FOVCircle = nil

local function GetFOVRadius()
    return math.tan(math.rad(1)) * (Camera.ViewportSize.Y / 2)
end

CameraGroupbox:AddToggle("Show FOV", {
    Text = "Show FOV",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Show FOV",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.showFov = enabled
        if enabled then
            if not FOVCircle then
                FOVCircle = Drawing.new("Circle")
                FOVCircle.Thickness = 1
                FOVCircle.NumSides = 100
                FOVCircle.Filled = false
                FOVCircle.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                FOVCircle.Position = Vector2.new(Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2, Camera.ViewportSize.Y / 2)
            end
            FOVCircle.Visible = true
        elseif FOVCircle then
            FOVCircle.Visible = false
        end
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddSlider("Aimbot FOV", {
    Text = "Aimbot FOV",
    Default = 45,
    Min = 1,
    Max = 120,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.aimbotFOV = value
        if Settings.showFov and FOVCircle then
            FOVCircle.Radius = value * GetFOVRadius()
        end
    end
})

local function UpdateFOVCircle()
    if FOVCircle then
        FOVCircle.Position = Vector2.new(Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2, Camera.ViewportSize.Y / 2)
        FOVCircle.Radius = Settings.aimbotFOV * GetFOVRadius()
    end
end

Camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(UpdateFOVCircle)
Camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("FieldOfView"):Connect(UpdateFOVCircle)

CameraGroupbox:AddToggle("FOV Changer", {
    Text = "FOV Changer",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Fov Changer",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.fovchanger = enabled
        if Settings.fovchanger then
            Camera.FieldOfView = Settings.CameraFOV
        else
            Camera.FieldOfView = 70
        end
    end
})

CameraGroupbox:AddSlider("FOV", {
    Text = "Field of View",
    Default = 70,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 120,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        if Settings.fovchanger then
            Camera.FieldOfView = value
        end
    end
})

local ESPSettings = {
    PlayerESP = false,
    mobESP = false,
    npcESP = false,
    ESPObjects = {},
    NPCESPOBjects = {},
    PlayerEspObjects = {},
    ActiveMobs = {},
    ActiveNPCs = {},
    ActivePlayers = {},
    fontSize = 14,
    espDistance = 1000,
    MobESPColor = Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
    NpcESPColor = Color3.new(0, 1, 0),
    PlayerESPColor = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
}

local function CreateESPText(color)
    local text = Drawing.new("Text")
    text.Visible = false
    text.Center = true
    text.Outline = true
    text.Color = color
    text.Size = ESPSettings.fontSize
    return text
end

local function CleanupESP(entity, objectsTable, activeTable)
    if activeTable[entity] then
        local data = activeTable[entity]
        if data.espText then
            data.espText:Remove()
        end
        activeTable[entity] = nil
    end
end

local function CleanupMobESP(entity)
    if ESPSettings.ActiveMobs[entity] then
        local data = ESPSettings.ActiveMobs[entity]
        if data.espText then
            data.espText:Remove()
        end
        if data.highlight then
            data.highlight:Destroy()
        end
        ESPSettings.ActiveMobs[entity] = nil
    end
end

local function SetupNPCESP(npc)
    if npc and (npc:IsA("Model") and not ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs[npc]) then
        local rootPart = npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if rootPart then
            local espText = CreateESPText(ESPSettings.NpcESPColor)
            espText.Visible = false
            table.insert(ESPSettings.NPCESPOBjects, espText)
            
            local espData = {espText = espText}
            ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs[npc] = espData
            
            local renderStepName = "UpdateNpcESP_" .. npc:GetDebugId()
            
            local function UpdateNPCESP()
                if npc and (npc.Parent and ESPSettings.npcESP) then
                    local playerCharacter = Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                    if playerCharacter then
                        local playerRoot = playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if playerRoot then
                            local distance = (rootPart.Position - playerRoot.Position).Magnitude
                            local screenPos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(rootPart.Position)
                            
                            if distance > ESPSettings.espDistance or not onScreen then
                                espText.Visible = false
                            else
                                espText.Text = string.format("[%s][Dist: %.1f]", npc.Name, distance)
                                espText.Size = ESPSettings.fontSize
                                espText.Position = Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y - 50)
                                espText.Visible = true
                            end
                        end
                    end
                else
                    RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(renderStepName)
                    CleanupESP(npc, ESPSettings.NPCESPOBjects, ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs)
                end
            end
            
            RunService:BindToRenderStep(renderStepName, Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1, UpdateNPCESP)
            
            npc.AncestryChanged:Connect(function(_, parent)
                if not parent then
                    RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(renderStepName)
                    CleanupESP(npc, ESPSettings.NPCESPOBjects, ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
end

local function SetupMobESP(mob)
    if mob and (mob:IsA("Model") and not ESPSettings.ActiveMobs[mob]) then
        local humanoid = mob:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        local rootPart = mob:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        
        if humanoid and rootPart then
            local espText = CreateESPText(ESPSettings.MobESPColor)
            espText.Visible = false
            table.insert(ESPSettings.ESPObjects, espText)
            
            local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
            highlight.Parent = mob
            highlight.FillColor = ESPSettings.MobESPColor
            highlight.Enabled = false
            
            local espData = {espText = espText, highlight = highlight}
            ESPSettings.ActiveMobs[mob] = espData
            
            local renderStepName = "UpdateESP_" .. mob:GetDebugId()
            
            local function UpdateMobESP()
                if mob and (mob.Parent and (humanoid and (rootPart and ESPSettings.mobESP))) then
                    local playerCharacter = Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                    if playerCharacter then
                        local playerRoot = playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if playerRoot then
                            local distance = (rootPart.Position - playerRoot.Position).Magnitude
                            local screenPos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(rootPart.Position)
                            
                            if distance > ESPSettings.espDistance or not onScreen then
                                espText.Visible = false
                                highlight.Enabled = false
                            else
                                local healthPercent = humanoid.MaxHealth > 0 and (humanoid.Health / humanoid.MaxHealth) * 100 or 0
                                local clampedHealth = math.clamp(math.floor(healthPercent), 0, 100)
                                local displayName = mob.Name:match("^(.-)_") or mob.Name
                                
                                espText.Text = string.format("[%s] [Dist: %.1f] [HP: %d%%]", displayName, distance, clampedHealth)
                                espText.Position = Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y - 50)
                                espText.Size = ESPSettings.fontSize
                                espText.Visible = true
                                highlight.Enabled = true
                            end
                        end
                    end
                else
                    RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(renderStepName)
                    CleanupMobESP(mob)
                end
            end
            
            RunService:BindToRenderStep(renderStepName, Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1, UpdateMobESP)
            
            mob.AncestryChanged:Connect(function(_, parent)
                if not parent then
                    RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(renderStepName)
                    CleanupMobESP(mob)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
end

local function InitializeMobESP()
    for _, entity in ipairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
        if entity:IsA("Model") and not (Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) or ESPSettings.ActiveMobs[entity]) then
            SetupMobESP(entity)
        end
    end
end

local function InitializeNPCESP()
    for _, npc in ipairs(workspace.Dialogues:GetChildren()) do
        if npc:IsA("Model") and not ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs[npc] then
            SetupNPCESP(npc)
        end
    end
end

workspace.Entities.ChildAdded:Connect(function(entity)
    if entity:IsA("Model") and not Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) then
        SetupMobESP(entity)
    end
end)

ESPGroupbox:AddToggle("PlayerESP", {
    Text = "Player ESP",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "ESP players with name, distance, and health",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ESPSettings.PlayerESP = enabled
        if ESPSettings.PlayerESP then
            PlayerESPModule:load()
        else
            PlayerESPModule:unload()
        end
    end
}):AddColorPicker("PlayerColorPicker", {
    Default = ESPSettings.MobESPColor,
    Title = "Player ESP Color",
    Transparency = 0,
    Callback = function(color) end
})

ESPGroupbox:AddToggle("MobESP", {
    Text = "MobESP",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "ESP mobs with name, distance, and health",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ESPSettings.mobESP = enabled
        if ESPSettings.mobESP then
            InitializeMobESP()
        else
            for entity in pairs(ESPSettings.ActiveMobs) do
                CleanupMobESP(entity)
            end
            ESPSettings.ESPObjects = {}
        end
    end
}):AddColorPicker("MobColorPicker", {
    Default = ESPSettings.MobESPColor,
    Title = "Mob ESP Color",
    Transparency = 0,
    Callback = function(color)
        ESPSettings.MobESPColor = color
        for _, data in pairs(ESPSettings.ActiveMobs) do
            if data.highlight then
                data.highlight.FillColor = color
            end
        end
    end
})

ESPGroupbox:AddToggle("NPCEsp", {
    Text = "NpcESP",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "NPC ESP",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ESPSettings.npcESP = enabled
        if ESPSettings.npcESP then
            InitializeNPCESP()
        else
            for entity in pairs(ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs) do
                CleanupESP(entity, ESPSettings.NPCESPOBjects, ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs)
            end
            ESPSettings.NPCESPOBjects = {}
        end
    end
}):AddColorPicker("NPCEspPicker", {
    Default = ESPSettings.NpcESPColor,
    Title = "NPC ESP COLOR",
    Transparency = 0,
    Callback = function(color)
        ESPSettings.NpcESPColor = color
        for _, data in pairs(ESPSettings.ActiveNPCs) do
            data.espText.Color = color
        end
    end
})

ESPGroupbox:AddSlider("Distance", {
    Text = "ESP Distance",
    Default = 1000,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 10000,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        ESPSettings.espDistance = value
    end
})

ESPGroupbox:AddSlider("TextSizeSlider", {
    Text = "Text Font Size",
    Default = 14,
    Min = 10,
    Max = 30,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        ESPSettings.fontSize = value
    end
})

local AutoFarmSettings = {
    AutoFarmMobsDistance = 10,
    AutoFarmMobsHeight = 0,
    AutoFarmMobs = false,
    AutoFarmSelectedMobs = false
}

WorldGroupbox:AddToggle("Attach to nearby mobs", {
    Text = "Auto Farm Nearby Mobs",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Farm Nearest mob",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobs = enabled
        if AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobs then
            task.spawn(function()
                while AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobs and task.wait() do
                    local playerCharacter = LocalPlayer.Character
                    if not (playerCharacter and (playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and Character.PrimaryPart)) then
                        return
                    end
                    
                    local playerRoot = playerCharacter.HumanoidRootPart
                    local closestDistance = math.huge
                    local closestTarget = nil
                    
                    for _, entity in pairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
                        if entity:IsA("Model") and not Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) then
                            local entityRoot = entity:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or entity.PrimaryPart
                            if entityRoot then
                                local distance = (playerRoot.Position - entityRoot.Position).Magnitude
                                if distance < closestDistance then
                                    closestTarget = entityRoot
                                    closestDistance = distance
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    if closestTarget then
                        repeat
                            SmoothTeleport(closestTarget.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobsHeight, AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobsDistance), 170)
                            task.wait()
                        until not (AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobs and (closestTarget.Parent and closestTarget:IsDescendantOf(workspace))) or closestTarget.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid").Health <= 0
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoFarmNearbyKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "AutoFarmNearby Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddToggle("Attach to nearby Players", {
    Text = "Auto Farm Nearby Players",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Auto Farm Nearest Players",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        AutoFarmSettings.autofarmplayers = enabled
        if AutoFarmSettings.autofarmplayers then
            task.spawn(function()
                while AutoFarmSettings.autofarmplayers and task.wait() do
                    local playerCharacter = LocalPlayer.Character
                    if not (playerCharacter and playerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
                        return
                    end
                    
                    local playerRoot = playerCharacter.HumanoidRootPart
                    local closestDistance = math.huge
                    local closestTarget = nil
                    
                    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                        if player ~= LocalPlayer and player.Character then
                            local targetCharacter = player.Character
                            local targetRoot = targetCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or targetCharacter.PrimaryPart
                            if targetRoot then
                                local distance = (playerRoot.Position - targetRoot.Position).Magnitude
                                if distance < closestDistance then
                                    closestTarget = targetRoot
                                    closestDistance = distance
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    if closestTarget then
                        SmoothTeleport(closestTarget.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobsHeight, AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobsDistance), 170)
                        task.wait()
                        if Settings.autofarmplayers and ((closestTarget and (closestTarget.Parent and closestTarget:IsDescendantOf(workspace))) and closestTarget.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid").Health > 0) then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("AutoFarmNearbyPlayersKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "AutoFarmNearby Players Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddSlider("Distance", {
    Text = "Distance",
    Default = 10,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 30,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobsDistance = value
    end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddSlider("Height", {
    Text = "Height",
    Default = 0,
    Min = -30,
    Max = 30,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        AutoFarmSettings.AutoFarmMobsHeight = value
    end
})

local BringMobsConnection = nil

WorldGroupbox:AddToggle("Bring Mob", {
    Text = "Bring Mob",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Bring Mob",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.bringmobs = enabled
        if Settings.bringmobs then
            BringMobsConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                if Settings.bringmobs then
                    for _, entity in ipairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
                        if entity:IsA("Model") and (entity:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and (not game.Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) and (GetDistance(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.PrimaryPart.Position, entity.PrimaryPart.Position) < Settings.bringmobsrange and isnetworkowner(entity.PrimaryPart)))) then
                            entity:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = LocalPlayer.Character.PrimaryPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 0, -Settings.bringmobsdistance)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        elseif BringMobsConnection then
            BringMobsConnection:Disconnect()
            BringMobsConnection = nil
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("BringMobKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Bring Mob Keybind",
    NoUI = false
})

WorldGroupbox:AddSlider("Bring Mobs Range", {
    Text = "Bring Mob Range",
    Default = 1000,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 10000,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.bringmobsrange = value
    end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddSlider("BringMobsDistance", {
    Text = "Bring Mob Distance",
    Default = 50,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 100,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.bringmobsdistance = value
    end
})

local KillAuraCredsConnection = nil

WorldGroupbox:AddToggle("Kill Aura", {
    Text = "Kill Aura",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Instant Kill",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.VoidMob = enabled
        if Settings.VoidMob then
            while Settings.VoidMob and task.wait() do
                for _, entity in ipairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
                    if entity:IsA("Model") and not game.Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) then
                        local humanoid = entity:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and entity:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                        if humanoid then
                            humanoid.Health = 0
                            humanoid.MaxHealth = 0
                        end
                        
                        for _, part in ipairs(entity:GetDescendants()) do
                            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                part:BreakJoints()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("KillAuraKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Kill Aura Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddToggle("Kill Aura If Creds", {
    Text = "Kill Aura if Creds",
    Default = false,
    Tooltip = "Instant Kill",
    Callback = function(enabled)
        Settings.killauraifcreds = enabled
        if enabled then
            KillAuraCredsConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                if Settings.killauraifcreds then
                    for _, entity in ipairs(workspace.Entities:GetChildren()) do
                        if entity:IsA("Model") and (not game.Players:FindFirstChild(entity.Name) and entity:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")) then
                            local humanoid = entity:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                            if humanoid and (humanoid.Health / humanoid.MaxHealth) * 100 < Settings.killaurahp then
                                humanoid.Health = 0
                                humanoid.MaxHealth = 0
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        elseif KillAuraCredsConnection then
            KillAuraCredsConnection:Disconnect()
        end
    end
}):AddKeyPicker("KillAuraIfCredsKeybind", {
    Default = "",
    SyncToggleState = true,
    Mode = "Toggle",
    Text = "Kill Aura if Creds Keybind",
    NoUI = false,
    Callback = function(enabled) end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddSlider("Kill Aura Creds HP Threshold", {
    Text = "Kill Aura HP Threshold %",
    Default = 100,
    Min = 0,
    Max = 100,
    Rounding = 0,
    Compact = true,
    Callback = function(value)
        Settings.killaurahp = value
    end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddButton("Go to quest marker", function()
    if Character:FindFirstChild("MissionIcon") then
        TeleportTo(Character.MissionIcon.Position.X, Character.MissionIcon.Position.Y, Character.MissionIcon.Position.Z)
    else
        warn("No Mission")
    end
    
    if Character:FindFirstChild("BoxDeliveryIcon") then
        TeleportTo(Character.BoxDeliveryIcon.Position.X, Character.BoxDeliveryIcon.Position.Y, Character.BoxDeliveryIcon.Position.Z)
    else
        warn("No Box Icon")
    end
end)

WorldGroupbox:AddButton("Go to Event marker", function()
    if Character:FindFirstChild("EventMarker") then
        TeleportTo(Character.EventMarker.Position.X, Character.EventMarker.Position.Y, Character.EventMarker.Position.Z)
    else
        warn("no event ")
    end
end)

WorldGroupbox:AddButton("Go to Nearest Loot Crate", function()
    local closestDistance = math.huge
    local closestCrate = nil
    
    for _, object in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
        if object.Name == "giftbox_blend" then
            local distance = (object.WorldPivot.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
            if distance < closestDistance then
                closestCrate = object
                closestDistance = distance
            end
        end
    end
    
    if closestCrate then
        TeleportTo(closestCrate.WorldPivot.Position.X, closestCrate.WorldPivot.Position.Y, closestCrate.WorldPivot.Position.Z)
    else
        warn("No giftbox_blend found in the workspace.")
    end
end)

WorldGroupbox:AddButton("Go to Nearest Artifact", function()
    local closestDistance = math.huge
    local closestArtifact = nil
    
    for _, object in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
        if string.find(object.Name, "Artifact") then
            local distance = (object.WorldPivot.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
            if distance < closestDistance then
                closestArtifact = object
                closestDistance = distance
            end
        end
    end
    
    if closestArtifact then
        TeleportTo(closestArtifact.WorldPivot.Position.X, closestArtifact.WorldPivot.Position.Y, closestArtifact.WorldPivot.Position.Z)
    else
        warn("No Artifact found in the workspace.")
    end
end)

local SelectedArea = nil

WorldGroupbox:AddDropdown("AreaDropdown", {
    Values = {"Anteiku", "Art Studio", "Clothing Store", "CCG Base", "Boss Arenas", "Ghoul Mission Board 1", "CCG Mission Board 1"},
    Default = {},
    Multi = false,
    Text = "Areas",
    Tooltip = "Select Area to tp to",
    Callback = function(value)
        SelectedArea = value
    end
})

WorldGroupbox:AddButton("Goto Selected Area", function()
    if SelectedArea == "Anteiku" then
        TeleportTo(8461.96582, 20.8455334, 1682.95093)
    end
    if SelectedArea == "Art Studio" then
        TeleportTo(8112.271, 8.47572327, -1640.54663)
    end
    if SelectedArea == "Clothing Store" then
        TeleportTo(8026.98535, 6.97037315, 1923.37378)
    end
    if SelectedArea == "CCG Base" then
        TeleportTo(7758.4750976562, -6.5043659210205, -654.69714355469)
    end
    if SelectedArea == "Boss Arenas" then
        TeleportTo(7714.3271484375, -5.3807783126831, -984.13073730469)
    end
    if SelectedArea == "Ghoul Mission Board 1" then
        TeleportTo(8447.2578125, -4.5083823204041, 1730.5115966797)
    end
    if SelectedArea == "CCG Mission Board 1" then
        TeleportTo(7696.603515625, 23.998931884766, -689.29748535156)
    end
end)

local function RemoveCharacterAppearance(character)
    for _, clothingType in pairs({"Shirt", "Pants"}) do
        local clothing = character:FindFirstChild(clothingType)
        if clothing then
            clothing:Destroy()
        end
    end
    
    for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
        if child:IsA("Accessory") or child:IsA("MeshPart") then
            child:Destroy()
        end
    end
    
    if character:FindFirstChild("Head") then
        character.Head.Transparency = 1
        for _, descendant in ipairs(character.Head:GetDescendants()) do
            if descendant:IsA("Decal") or descendant:IsA("SpecialMesh") or descendant:IsA("Part") then
                descendant:Destroy()
            end
        end
    end
    
    for _, fakeHead in ipairs(workspace.FakeHeads:GetChildren()) do
        if string.match(fakeHead.Name, LocalPlayer.Name) then
            fakeHead:Destroy()
        end
    end
    
    character:FindFirstChild("Left Arm").Transparency = 0
    character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm").Transparency = 0
end

local function AttachAccessoryToArm(assetId, character, position, rotation, isLeftArm, hideArm)
    local accessory = game:GetObjects("rbxassetid://" .. tostring(assetId))[1]
    if accessory then
        local arm = character:FindFirstChild(isLeftArm and "Left Arm" or "Right Arm")
        if arm then
            if hideArm then
                arm.Transparency = 1
            end
            accessory.Parent = character
            
            if accessory:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
                local weld = Instance.new("Weld")
                weld.Name = isLeftArm and "LeftArmWeld" or "RightArmWeld"
                weld.Part0 = arm
                weld.Part1 = accessory.Handle
                
                local defaultPos, defaultRot
                if isLeftArm then
                    defaultPos = Vector3.new(-accessory.Handle.Size.X / 2, -accessory.Handle.Size.Y / 2, 0)
                    defaultRot = Vector3.new(0, 90, 0)
                else
                    defaultPos = Vector3.new(accessory.Handle.Size.X / 2, -accessory.Handle.Size.Y / 2, 0)
                    defaultRot = Vector3.new(0, -90, 0)
                end
                
                weld.C0 = CFrame.new(position or defaultPos) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(rotation and rotation.X or defaultRot.X), math.rad(rotation and rotation.Y or defaultRot.Y), math.rad(rotation and rotation.Z or defaultRot.Z))
                weld.Parent = accessory.Handle
            end
        end
    end
end

local function AttachAccessoryToTorso(assetId, character, position, rotation)
    local accessory = game:GetObjects("rbxassetid://" .. tostring(assetId))[1]
    if accessory then
        local torso = character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso") or character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
        if torso then
            accessory.Parent = character
            
            if accessory:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
                local weld = Instance.new("Weld")
                weld.Name = "HeadWeld"
                weld.Part0 = torso
                weld.Part1 = accessory.Handle
                weld.C0 = CFrame.new(position or Vector3.new(0, torso.Size.Y / 1.15 + accessory.Handle.Size.Y / 2, 0)) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(rotation.X), math.rad(rotation.Y), math.rad(rotation.Z))
                weld.Parent = accessory.Handle
            end
        end
    end
end

local function ApplyClothing(shirtId, pantsId, character)
    local function LoadClothing(assetId, name)
        local clothing = game:GetObjects("rbxassetid://" .. tostring(assetId))[1]
        if clothing then
            clothing.Parent = character
            clothing.Name = name
        end
    end
    
    LoadClothing(shirtId, "Shirt")
    LoadClothing(pantsId, "Pants")
end

local function SetSkinColor(character, colorName)
    local brickColor = BrickColor.new(colorName or "Light orange")
    for _, partName in pairs({"Torso", "UpperTorso", "Left Arm", "Right Arm", "Left Leg", "Right Leg"}) do
        local part = character:FindFirstChild(partName)
        if part then
            part.BrickColor = brickColor
        end
    end
end

VisualMiscGroupbox:AddDropdown("Morphs", {
    Values = {"Goku", "Naruto", "Miku", "Aizen", "Gawr Gura", "Guts", "Gojo", "Toji", "Mahoraga", "Kurumi", "Changli", "Rias Gremory", "Akeno Himejima", "Akame", "Acheron", "Esdeath", "Sakuya", "Sparkle", "Jane Doe", "Alya", "Sung Jin Woo", "Ryuko", "Hutao", "MommyRaga", "Castorice", "Shadow", "Lebron James", "Steve", "Gilgamesh", "Ishtar", "Albedo", "Astolfo", "Zani", "Cantarella", "Yinlin", "Vasto Lorde", "Igris", "Beru", "Cha Hae In", "Luffy", "Frieren", "Raiden Shogun", "Rimuru", "Zero Two", "Columbina", "Bocchi", "Mavuika", "Carlotta", "Kafka", "Jingliu", "Feixiao", "Shorekeeper", "Kiana HoF", "Senti", "Mei HoT", "Aglaea", "Mari Setogaya"},
    Default = {},
    Multi = false,
    Text = "Morphs",
    Tooltip = "Morphs",
    Callback = function(selected)
        if selected == "Goku" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(96778240725860, Character, Vector3.new(0, 2.3, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))
            ApplyClothing(18642081551, 13980707182, Character)
        elseif selected == "Naruto" then
            SetSkinColor(Character, "Pastel yellow")
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(129818847988995, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.8, 0), Vector3.new(0, -90, 0))
            ApplyClothing(6469644436, 2733834231, Character)
        elseif selected == "Miku" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(107263500564078, Character, Vector3.new(0, 0.8, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))
            ApplyClothing(11562331516, 11562350632, Character)
        elseif selected == "Aizen" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(117644781784979, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.7, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))
            ApplyClothing(87853669951881, 118029167731205, Character)
        elseif selected == "Gawr Gura" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(93023559996037, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.2, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))
            ApplyClothing(6392201226, 5896597102, Character)
        elseif selected == "Guts" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(117337600216775, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.6, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(83748529688503, Character, Vector3.new(0, 0, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))
            ApplyClothing(13381096342, 13381103162, Character)
        elseif selected == "Gojo" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(132501783778842, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.9, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))

        elseif selected == "Toji" then
            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)

            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(15960510977, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.5, 0), Vector3.new(0, 0, 0))

            SetSkinColor(Character)
            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(89528590195822, Character, Vector3.new(0, 1.5, 0), Vector3.new(0, 180, 0))
            AttachAccessoryToTorso(16560974401, Character, Vector3.new(0, 0.8, 0.3), Vector3.new(0, 180, 0))
            ApplyClothing(8242153821, 18183543100, Character)
        elseif selected == "MommyRaga" then

            RemoveCharacterAppearance(Character)
